components.text: Register your account today using a valid email and password

layout_structure: The screen features a top-aligned, full-width dark blue gradient background acting as a hero section, containing the main title and description. A large white card with rounded corners overlaps the lower part of this hero section and extends to the bottom of the screen. This card houses the 'Sign up' section title, a vertically stacked form with four input fields, a checkbox, a horizontally aligned 'Forgot password?' link, and a primary action button. A centered text-and-link combination serves as a footer below the primary button, outside the main card.

color_scheme.primary_background: Gradient from dark blue (#1D2C67 approx.) to medium blue (#2A58C0 approx.)
color_scheme.primary_text: White (#FFFFFF) for header text, button text
color_scheme.secondary_text: Dark Gray / Black (#333333 approx.) for 'Sign up' title, 'Remember me', 'Already have an account?'

typography.font_family: Sans-serif (likely a system default like San Francisco or Roboto)

spacing_and_density.vertical_spacing: Generous spacing between major sections (header, card, footer) and between form elements, creating an airy feel.
spacing_and_density.horizontal_padding: Consistent horizontal padding within the form card for text fields and buttons, providing comfortable margins.
spacing_and_density.element_size: Text fields and buttons appear to have ample height, suggesting good touch target sizes.
spacing_and_density.density: Moderate density, leaning towards spaciousness, enhancing readability and usability.

accessibility_observations: **Color Contrast**: White text on dark blue background in the header provides good contrast. Dark gray text on white background is also good. Light gray placeholder text might have insufficient contrast against the white background for users with low vision (WCAG AA might be borderline).
**Typo**: The placeholder 'Conform your Password' contains a typo and should be 'Confirm your Password', which can cause confusion for users.
**Touch Target Size**: Input fields, checkbox, and the main button appear to be sufficiently sized for easy interaction on mobile devices.

**Labels**: Placeholders are used as primary labels. While icons provide additional context, dedicated visible labels or at least properly implemented accessibility labels (for screen readers) would improve usability for some users.
notable_patterns: **Hero Header**: A distinct, branded top section used to convey the primary purpose of the screen.

**Card UI / Floating Sheet**: A common pattern where content (in this case, a form) is presented within a separate, elevated container, often with rounded corners, providing a visual separation from the background.
**Standard Form Layout**: Vertical stacking of input fields, clearly delineated by their backgrounds and placeholders, with a primary action button at the bottom.
**Contextual Links**: 'Forgot password?' and 'Sign in' links provide immediate access to related flows, enhancing user experience.
**Optional Field Indicator**: Clearly marking the 'Referral ID' field as '(Optional)' helps users understand what is required.
